name: feature.workflow-author.agents
description: AI Workflow Author agent pack (ADR 0072 / ADR 0014) — a manifest agent whose tools are feature.workflow-author.nodes over the ctx.features['workflow-author'] surface. From the AI chat it reads the node catalog, authors a connected schema-valid WorkflowDefinition, and registers it so it opens in the builder. Tool-allowlisted to the workflow-author feature surface only.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Workflow Architect
agents.description: Turns a natural-language automation intent into a runnable workflow: reads the closed-world node catalog, drafts a connected node/edge DAG, validates it, and registers it — grounded via feature.workflow-author.nodes over ctx.features['workflow-author']. Never invents node types; the human reviews the result in the builder.
